name: Dialogue Realism Suite
description: Deterministic fixtures for interruption, asymmetry, pragmatic subtext, and fake-natural dialogue detection.

fixtures.title: Asymmetric Exchange With Subtext
fixtures.text_under_test: "Last boarding," the porter said. "You always say that early." "Only when someone is hiding something." Mara smiled without looking at him. "Then don't look so hard."
fixtures.notes: Contains asymmetry, implied accusation, and uneven turn lengths.

fixtures.title: Polite But Thin
fixtures.text_under_test: "Good evening," the porter said. "Good evening," Mara replied. "Are you boarding?" "Yes, I am boarding."
fixtures.notes: Superficially valid dialogue with low subtext and low speaker divergence.

fixtures.title: Fake-Natural Exposition Dump
fixtures.text_under_test: "As you know, porter, I am anxious because I possess a missing ticket and I worry that you will recognize this deficiency." "I understand your anxiety and acknowledge the narrative tension of this exchange," the porter said.
fixtures.notes: Engineered to look fluent while sounding synthetic and expository.

fixtures.title: Near-Human With Hidden Flatness
fixtures.text_under_test: "Late again," the porter said. "You noticed." "I notice everything." "That must be tiring." "Not if the work is good."
fixtures.notes: Looks polished, but lacks interruption and deeper pragmatic instability.
